title: KubeJS Iron's Spells
description: An addon for KubeJS that allows for creating custom spells, spellbooks, and more from Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.
body:
[![Support me on Ko-Fi!](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/sentwayfarer)

This is a [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs) addon that allows for script creators to have access to creating custom [Iron's Spells and Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) features, such as:

- Custom spells
- Custom spell schools and attributes for them
- Custom special items such as staves, spell books, and magic swords
- Special event handlers, e.g. `PlayerEvents.changeMana`
- EntityJS compatibility for custom spell-casting mobs and changing existing mob AI to cast spells
- Alchemist Cauldron recipe support
- Full ProbeJS support
- More soon!

More info on the [official KubeJS Wiki page for third-party addons.](https://kubejs.com/wiki/addons/irons-spells)
